_metadata.description: UQBS Assurance of Learning status overlay

statuses.tbd: Course needs AoL mapping but no specific GA+assessment match identified yet
statuses.identified: Team has flagged a good course+GA+assessment match
statuses.rubric_in_dev: Rubric is being built or revised to integrate GA criteria
statuses.active: Rubric built and being used in a live semester offering
statuses.established: Rubric used, data collected and reviewed — loop closed

_metadata.note: Live AoL data starts when the team populates taxonomy/aol-template.csv and runs scraper/import_aol.py. Empty = nothing shown (AoL is "coming soon").
